items.name: Crimson Aristocrat Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🕯️ Commanding elegance born of midnight and wine.
This black and crimson tailcoat radiates noble dominance and dark refinement. Golden trim and rich red lapels emphasize its theatrical, vampiric charm — perfect for avatars of charisma and control.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Sharp silhouette with regal gold detailing
Red and black contrast for timeless authority
Ideal for vampire, noble, or steampunk aesthetics
PBR materials add realistic satin sheen and fabric depth
🔍 Keywords: coat, red, black, noble, vampire, elegant, gothic, formal, PBR, tailcoat
Power whispered, not shouted — sophistication in shadow.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: Midnight Flow Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🖤 Elegant • Dramatic • Timeless
This coat drapes like a story — a flowing black silhouette that feels both mysterious and graceful. Its long cut moves naturally, almost like it’s alive with every step, while the subtle worn edges give it depth and character. Sleek leather-like textures add a modern touch, making it perfect for avatars who want to stand out with quiet confidence.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Long, flowing design for dramatic movement
✨ PBR textures that give the fabric a realistic sheen
🧵 Detailed stitching & natural folds for authenticity
🌌 A look that works for fantasy, urban, or cinematic roleplay
🎮 Versatile style — cool, mysterious, but never harsh
🔍 Keywords: black coat, long trench coat, cinematic outfit, stylish fashion, mysterious robe, Roblox
